project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining power-user features with modern UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: v1.0 Pre-Release Execution — Phase 2 (Regression Infrastructure)
current_phase.details: Session 44 ran /implement on the Phase 2 plan as main-agent orchestrator (Session 42 pattern — no implement-orchestrator subagent). All 5 phases / 25 sub-phases landed: Phase 1 (IME broadcasts + 5 instrumentation sites via ime-core-agent), Phase 2 (Node driver server extension — 9 new endpoints + wave-gate + adb-exec modules + array-identity splice fix), Phase 3 (Python harness upgrade — driver HTTP client, audio, SSIM, regex fix, layout-mode helper, auto-enable gate), Phase 4 (9 new test modules + 4 long-press JSON expectation files covering 111 keys + coverage matrix update — required 1 correction cycle for F1 missing Kotlin emits in clipboard/macros/command/plugin + F2 speculative broadcast + R1 MacroChipStrip always-visible emit + R2 privacy payload tightening), Phase 5 (key-coordinates COMPACT/COMPACT_DEV rows + test_modes round-trip + registry updates + coverage matrix + 5.2 tier stabilization deferred to human-operator runtime). Gradle build+lint PASS after every phase that touched Kotlin. Completeness review policy: single-sweep per phase against plan+spec intent (not 3-cycle adversarial). Working tree only — nothing committed. Phase 1 11 commits from Session 42 still unpushed. Ready for review + commit.

active_blockers: Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) still need sourcing — Phase 1 scaffold landed (app/src/main/assets/ + MODEL_PROVENANCE.md + LFS .gitattributes); human operator sources binaries + records SHA256s

SwiftKey reference captures incomplete — 1 of 12+ modes captured (COMPACT dark, saved as compact-dark.png and compact-dark-cropped.png). Remaining dark-mode captures: Qwerty/Full/Symbols/Fn/Phone. Light theme deferred per user.
11 Phase 1 commits unpushed on main — awaiting user confirmation to push to origin
Phase 1 manual verification checklists created but not yet run on device (phase1-voice-verification.md, phase1-regression-smoke.md)
400-line rule violations in 9 files — final release gate (Phase 4 of umbrella spec); tracked via GH #9
Lint backlog: 203 errors + 555 warnings, all pre-existing fork baggage (translation/namespace/unused-resources). Spec §6 Phase 3.7 scope, not Phase 1.
jcodemunch Kotlin import resolver broken for DevKey repo — find_importers, get_blast_radius, find_dead_code, get_dependency_graph return no-signal; fallback to search_text documented
Compose UI test deps incompatible with API 36 (Espresso InputManager.getInstance reflection)

metadata.session_notes: Session 44: Ran /implement on the Phase 2 plan as main-agent orchestrator (Session 42 pattern). All 5 phases / 25 sub-phases landed on working tree. Phase 1 via ime-core-agent (IME broadcasts + 5 instrumentation sites). Phases 2-5 via general-purpose agents (Node driver server extension, Python harness upgrade, 9 new test modules + 111 long-press JSON entries, tier stabilization docs + coverage matrix). Gradle build+lint PASS after every Kotlin-touching phase. Phase 4 required 1 correction cycle: completeness cycle-1 REJECT on F1 (missing Kotlin emits for clipboard/macros/command/plugin — emit sites ARE required by the plan's (modify) annotations), F2 (test_command_mode.py used speculative TOGGLE_COMMAND_MODE broadcast not sanctioned by plan), F3 (long-press JSON count mismatch — turned out to be stale finding, actual 111=111). Fixer added emits to ClipboardPanel/MacroGridPanel/MacroChipStrip/CommandModeDetector/PluginManager + rewrote test_command_mode to terminal-package auto-detect path. Cycle-2 REJECT on R1 (MacroChipStrip always-visible emit defeats test_macros) + R2 (package name leaked in auto-detect privacy payload) — fixed directly via Edit: removed the MacroChipStrip LaunchedEffect, tightened CommandModeDetector emit to trigger-only, updated test_command_mode allowed-keys set. Final build PASS. Two defects filed as GH issues. Review policy used: single completeness sweep per phase (not 3-cycle adversarial). 5.2 tier stabilization DEFERRED (needs emulator + driver server + Whisper models + SwiftKey captures). Nothing committed — working tree only.
